plant.description: History: High-altitude Himalayan herb used for centuries for liver care. Chemistry: Contains Picroside I & II (Kutkin). Environment: Found at 3000-5000m in the Himalayas.

ayurvedic_properties.dosha_karma: Primarily pacifies Kapha and Pitta; strongest liver purgative.

medicinal_uses: Liver Health: Best herb for viral hepatitis and bile stimulation.
Digestive Regulation: Scrapes toxins (Ama) from the digestive tract.
Skin Conditions: Purifies blood for psoriasis and eczema.
Fever Management: Effective antipyretic for chronic fevers.

safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.

plant_profile.note: AI estimated profile based on known properties
